B3_D1_Pipeline.Comment: Auto-generated. Variant: Job:Database (pure SQL, no Python on agent). Only jobs with a sql: block in the manifest are included. Deploy: setup.sh --variant database

B3_close_market_eod.SQLScript:
SELECT COUNT(*) AS row_count
FROM DEMOPOC.ASTADRVT_TRADE_MVMT
WHERE business_date = ?
B3_close_market_eod.Description: EOD market close — consolidates book, calculates closing prices and VWAP

B3_reconcile_d1_positions.SQLScript:
SELECT COUNT(*) AS row_count
FROM DEMOPOC.ASTANO_FGBE_DRVT_PSTN
WHERE business_date = ?
B3_reconcile_d1_positions.Description: D+1 reconciliation — matches trades to settlement instructions and participant positions

B3_quality_gate_d1.Description: D+1 quality gate — completeness, uniqueness, consistency, reasonableness, timeliness
